title: The Assam (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1951
full_text: The Assam (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1951 आसाम (सीमा-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1951 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1951-47 Act Number: 47 Enactment Date: 1951-09-01 Act Year: 1951 Short Title: The Assam (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1951 Hindi Title: आसाम (सीमा-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1951 Long Title: An Act to alter the boundaries of the State of Assam consequent on the cession of a strip of territory comprised in that State to the Government of Bhutan. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-09-1951 Schedule 1.
